setup_task.sh line 94: for i in range(1, 16) creates 15 products (CORE-001 through CORE-015)

privileged_info_summary: The task generates synthetic product data via Magento REST API: 25 'Legacy' products with SKU prefix 'LEG-' and 15 'Core' products with SKU prefix 'CORE-'. All products are initially created with status 1 (Enabled) and tax_class_id 2 (Taxable Goods). The expected completion state is status 2 (Disabled) and tax_class 0 (None) for Legacy products only, with Core products remaining untouched at status 1 and tax_class 2.
